title: Federal Energy Management Program Funding Opportunities
description: FEMP provides direct funding to federal agencies through the Assisting Federal Facilities with Energy Conservation Technologies (AFFECT) program.
text:
The U.S. Department of Energy'sFederal Energy Management Program (FEMP) provides direct funding to Federal agencies through the Assisting Federal Facilities with Energy Conservation Technologies (AFFECT) program.
AFFECT offers grants for developing energy and water efficiency projects and processes at U.S. Federal government-owned facilities.
The AFFECT program supports energy and water efficiency upgrades in Federal buildings through affordable solutions, public-private partnerships, and best practices.
